diagnostics.headline: CS/min 6.4 vs your 3.6 norm — above your level

notes: Their main damage was Eden (37k physical); 2/5 of you itemized armor.
Enemy ran 3/5 on or near their meta core.

coaching.headline: Lost the map 1–6 on towers and 8–25 on objectives — a 27-minute macro loss with no healers to blame, just lost neutrals and fights.
coaching.team: No enemy healers, so this was purely losing the objective and tower war. Cuban's Shinbi offlane was your one favored lane; the rest were behind and you never contested neutrals (8–25). Everyone was on a sensible lane — this is a fight/macro loss, not a lineup one. Win a Fangtooth and a fight before committing.
coaching.whatShiftedIt: Don't fight for objectives you can't win — you lost neutrals 8–25. Play for vision and picks, then take the Fangtooth off the back of a kill.

perPlayer.a0c393cc-1437-4bdc-8168-64676ce2166c: Shinbi offlane was your favored lane (2/5) — you built the Orb core; just lost the matchup on the scoreboard.
perPlayer.10edbf65-457d-48d0-9151-9df5b4fcb40a: Steel support into The Fey — 6 deaths; as the frontline you wanted to peel, not trade into a poke mid.
perPlayer.a412baf3-dd17-4f89-8ecf-9d0704f3a79e: Argus mid into a favored Legion — on your lane it'd be Khaimera, but this was a reasonable flex; the loss was team macro.
perPlayer.16f28434-561f-4f23-9454-40321f4a1ef3: Drongo carry 7/4 on your lane — your cleanest game; the team lost the map around you.
perPlayer.7c8ab99c-31c5-4ea5-a6fa-e0d6417c3f1b: Boris jungle (7/7) into Serath — fed even with the kills; tighten pathing when the map's slipping.
